recommendations.title: Doogal
recommendations.overview: An adorable candy-loving mutt goes on a mission to save the world.
recommendations.director: Jean Duval, Dave Borthwick, Frank Passingham

recommendations.title: The Snow Queen
recommendations.overview: The Snow Queen creates a world of eternal winter, frosting human souls and emotions. When she turns Kai, the son of a wizard, into an ice statue, his sister embarks on a journey to save him and bring life back to the world.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Goblin King
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Animation, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Music
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo and Shaggy must go into the underworld ruled by The Goblin King in order to stop a mortal named The Amazing Krudsky who wants power and is a threat to their pals: Fred, Velma, and Daphne.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: Twin Sitters
recommendations.overview: An evil business executive is releasing dangerous toxins and the Barbarian Brothers set out to stop his evil work.

recommendations.title: Vivo
recommendations.overview: A music-loving kinkajou named Vivo embarks on the journey of a lifetime to fulfill his destiny and deliver a love song for an old friend.

recommendations.title: Rise of the Guardians
recommendations.overview: When an evil spirit known as Pitch lays down the gauntlet to take over the world, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

recommendations.title: That Christmas
recommendations.overview: It's an unforgettable Christmas for the townsfolk of Wellington-on-Sea when the worst snowstorm in history alters everyone's plans — including Santa's.

recommendations.title: Doraemon: Nobita's Great Adventure in the Antarctic Kachi Kochi
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Family, Science Fiction, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Doraemon and Nobita discover a mysterious golden ring far beneath the ice in Antarctica, leading them to uncover an ancient, ruined city.

recommendations.title: The Book of Life
recommendations.overview: The journey of Manolo, a young man who is torn between fulfilling the expectations of his family and following his heart. Before choosing which path to follow, he embarks on an incredible adventure that spans fantastical worlds where he must face his
